name: Pork with Green Beans and Mushrooms
recipeIngredient: 4 cups Green beans, fresh or frozen
1 1/2 tbsp Corn starch dissolved in 1/2 cup Water
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice and prepare all ingredients.
2. Place oil in wok and heat up moderately. Add pork and onions to wok and stir fry together two minutes. Add soy sauce, beans, salt and 3/4 cup of water. Cover wok and cook ingredients a full 6 minutes under medium high heat. Stir the ingredients several times by lifting cover of wok to ensure everything is cooked through. Add mushrooms at the end of six minutes. Cook for further 3 minutes with wok covered. Lift cover once or twice to stir ingredients to mix them. Mix corn starch solution in 1/2 cup of water. Remove cover from wok, add starch solution to form gravy. Turn off heat.
